column1: # Open-source reference repositories for the ai-pipestream platform.
# These are pinned, vendored checkouts of the projects the platform builds on
# top of. They live under $WORKSPACE/reference-code/ and are NEVER imported
# or built — they exist so developers (and LLMs) can grep authoritative source
# instead of guessing from web results. See docs/standards/00-source-of-truth.md.
# Format: name|git_url|branch   ('-' = remote default branch, '#' = comment)
# Despite the .tsv extension, fields are '|'-delimited for historical reasons.
